# 龟迹 CheloniaTrace

> Turtle feeding calculator, Testudines encyclopedia, and research database.
> 龟类喂食策略在线计算、龟鳖目物种百科与研究资料库。

## Core pages

- Home / Feeding Calculator: https://www.guiji.online/zh
- Feeding Strategy Calculator: https://www.guiji.online/zh/tools/feeding-strategy
- Testudines Taxonomy Tree: https://www.guiji.online/zh/taxonomy
- Turtle Encyclopedia: https://www.guiji.online/zh/encyclopedia
- Research Database: https://www.guiji.online/zh/research
- Species Evidence: https://www.guiji.online/zh/research/species
- Source List: https://www.guiji.online/zh/research/sources
- Download App: https://www.guiji.online/zh/download

## English pages

- Home / Feeding Calculator: https://www.guiji.online/en
- Feeding Strategy Calculator: https://www.guiji.online/en/tools/feeding-strategy
- Testudines Taxonomy Tree: https://www.guiji.online/en/taxonomy
- Turtle Encyclopedia: https://www.guiji.online/en/encyclopedia
- Research Database: https://www.guiji.online/en/research
- Species Evidence: https://www.guiji.online/en/research/species
- Source List: https://www.guiji.online/en/research/sources
- Download App: https://www.guiji.online/en/download

## About

CheloniaTrace (龟迹) is a turtle/pet care platform offering:
- Research-backed feeding strategy calculator
- Complete Testudines taxonomy browser (order to subspecies)
- Species trait database with images and AI guide summaries
- Academic research provenance with structured evidence
- Smart home integration (Xiaomi Mijia) for automated feeding

## Structure

- /taxa/{slug} — Individual taxon pages with lineage, traits, and plate references
- /research/species — Species-level evidence coverage scores
- /research/sources — Source list with levels (L1 authority databases, L2 papers, L3 husbandry guides)
- /research/sources/{id} — Individual source detail with linked evidence
